title: Sendinblue vs Loops (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Sendinblue vs Loops: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Sendinblue and Loops comes down to your specific use case. Sendinblue is built for transactional email and SMS campaigns, while Loops targets SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails.

comparison_table.tool_b: Saas Companies Sending Product And Lifecycle Emails

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on transactional email and SMS campaigns
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Sendinblue wins for transactional email and SMS campaigns, while Loops is stronger for SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Sendinblue or Loops?
faq.a: Sendinblue starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Loops to Sendinblue?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
